title: Dha'eh
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''dha'eh''' was a large [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creature that was of great value to the extragalactic race.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{Mo}}
